ham.subject: Updated Company Leave Policy Effective July 1, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

We are pleased to announce that the Company Leave Policy has been revised and will take effect on July 1, 2026. The key updates include:

1. **Increased Paid Time Off** – Employees now receive 20 days of PTO per calendar year, up from 15.
2. **Flexible Sick Leave** – Up to 10 additional sick days are available for personal or family health needs.
3. **Remote Work Days** – Employees may now accrue up to 5 remote work days per quarter.
4. **Parental Leave** – Enhanced paternity leave to 12 weeks and maternity leave to 18 weeks, in addition to existing benefits.

Please review the full policy document attached to this email. If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to reach out to the HR Department at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your continued dedication and hard work.

Best regards,

Sarah Thompson
Director of Human Resources

---
HR Department
Company Headquarters
123 Business Ave, Suite 400
City, State ZIP
Phone: (555) 123-4567

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Confirm Your Attendance at the Upcoming Zoom Meeting
spam.body:
Hello [Employee Name],

You have been scheduled to participate in an urgent Zoom meeting with the Executive Leadership Team regarding the upcoming product launch. Please confirm your attendance by clicking the link below:

<URL>

**Meeting Details**
Date: Tuesday, May 14, 2026
Time: 10:30 AM – 11:30 AM (EST)
Location: Zoom (Meeting ID: 123-456-7890)

To ensure the meeting is secure, we strongly recommend that you log in at least 5 minutes before the scheduled start time. If you do not confirm your attendance, your access to the meeting will be automatically revoked.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

John Doe
Executive Assistant to the CEO

---
Corporate Communications
